generated_assessment.reasoning: The exposure text raised valid concerns about the fairness of alliance commitments, making me reconsider the level of support I previously had. The argument about focusing on domestic issues resonated, but my underlying support for alliances remains.

request_payload.exposure_text: I get why people support alliances, but have we really thought about the trade-offs? Our partners aren't pulling their weight - NATO allies only spend 1.5% of GDP on defense on average. Meanwhile, our own communities are struggling with basic services. Shouldn't we focus on fixing things at home first? #NationalSecurity #AllianceCommitment
